goal: 为 Agent Capsule 增加无需 Go 的 release 二进制安装入口

summary.title: 增加无需 Go 的 release 二进制安装入口
summary.what: 新增 install.sh，让普通用户通过 GitHub Releases 的平台二进制安装 capsule：脚本会解析 latest 或指定版本，下载对应 darwin/linux/windows 归档，校验 checksums.txt，并默认安装到 ~/.local/bin。同步中英文 README、agent-capsule skill、capsule manifest/AGENT_README 里的 install_command，以及 Cloudflare Worker 分享页和 agent-readable manifest 的默认安装命令。
summary.why: 用户指出当前安装路径仍要求 go install；这会让没有 Go 的接收方 agent 或普通用户卡在 CLI 安装阶段。项目其实已经有 release workflow 和 v0.1.0 二进制资产，缺的是把 release 二进制变成默认用户安装协议。
summary.user_goal: 为 Agent Capsule 增加无需 Go 的 release 二进制安装入口

decisions.chose: 默认使用 curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/z2z23n0/agent-capsule/main/install.sh | sh 安装 release 二进制。
decisions.rationale: 这条路径不要求本机有 Go，能直接消费现有 GitHub Release 资产，并通过 checksums.txt 做完整性校验。
rejected: 继续把 go install 作为 README 和 skill 的默认安装入口
先做 Homebrew tap 再解决无 Go 安装

decisions.chose: install.sh 默认解析 releases/latest，同时支持 CAPSULE_VERSION=v0.1.0 固定版本。
decisions.rationale: 默认 latest 对普通用户最省心；固定版本给自动化、企业镜像或复现实验留出口。
rejected: 在 README 里硬编码 v0.1.0 作为唯一安装版本

decisions.chose: 把 capsule manifest、AGENT_README、Worker 分享 manifest/html 和 agent skill 的默认安装命令一起切到 installer。
decisions.rationale: 接收方可能从 README、zip 内 AGENT_README、分享页 FOR AGENTS 或 skill 任意入口开始；这些入口必须给出同一条无 Go 安装路径。

decisions.chose: README 和 skill 仍保留 go install，但只作为源码开发路径。
decisions.rationale: 开发者从 main 安装仍然有价值，但不应成为普通接收方恢复 capsule 的前置条件。

decisions.chose: 将 README demo 系列 proposal 视为同文件不同语义区域的相邻变更，本次只改 Install 小节；README 基线重写意图是当前文档基础。
decisions.rationale: 已检查 int_03641bd3、int_57fc2f82、int_59772461、int_68641001、int_b73ec084 和 int_d4e31ace，相关 intent 都围绕 demo 资产或 README 基线，不改变 release installer 方案。

review_notes: 验证：真实执行 INSTALL_DIR=<tmp>/bin ./install.sh，成功下载 latest release v0.1.0，安装后的 capsule --help 可运行。
验证：deploy/cloudflare-worker 下 npm test 通过，16 个 Worker 测试全绿。
按仓库指引未运行耗时的 golang make test。
当前 latest release 仍是 v0.1.0；合并后 install.sh 会从 raw main 提供，但真正安装到用户机器的二进制版本仍由 GitHub latest release 决定。

architectural_claims: Normal Agent Capsule CLI installation no longer requires a local Go toolchain; it can consume GitHub Release binary archives directly.
install.sh is the canonical no-Go installer and verifies release archives against checksums.txt before copying capsule into the install directory.
Newly generated capsules and hosted share manifests advertise the release installer as install_command while preserving the manifest schema.
Go-based installation remains a source-development path rather than the default receiver bootstrap path.
behavioral_changes: README.md and README.zh-CN.md now lead with the release installer and move go install under source development.
skills/agent-capsule/SKILL.md now instructs agents to install the latest released binary when capsule is missing.
internal/capsule.InstallCmd now emits the release installer into manifest.json and AGENT_README.md.
deploy/cloudflare-worker now replaces uploaded import.install_command values with the release installer in public share metadata and HTML.
internal/codex self-export filtering recognizes the new installer command as Agent Capsule setup noise while retaining compatibility with old go install commands.
install.sh supports latest or pinned CAPSULE_VERSION, custom INSTALL_DIR, custom CAPSULE_REPO, and custom CAPSULE_BINARY.

api_changes.compatibility: schema unchanged; consumers should already treat install_command as display/execution guidance
schema unchanged; old links may still carry old command text

security_implications: install.sh verifies downloaded release archives against checksums.txt before installation.
The README and metadata now recommend curl | sh from the official GitHub repository, which makes the raw GitHub main branch and release assets part of the installer trust boundary.
Worker sanitization still prevents uploaded share metadata from substituting attacker-controlled install commands.
migration_notes: Existing capsules and share links may still contain the previous go install command; newly generated capsules and newly served Worker metadata use the release installer after this change is deployed.
Until a newer GitHub Release is published, the installer resolves latest to v0.1.0 even if main contains newer unreleased code.
